name: Add timeout-minutes to workflow jobs
description: Add explicit `timeout-minutes: <N>` to every workflow job that lacks one. Default is the GH Actions 6-hour ceiling, which lets a stuck job (commonly a codeload-fetch hang per standards#208) burn budget out of proportion to its expected runtime.
match: Job header in .github/workflows/*.yml without subsequent timeout-minutes line
replacement: Insert `timeout-minutes: 10` (or proportional override via `job_timeout_overrides`) directly after `runs-on:`

discovery.root_cause: GH Actions default timeout is 6 hours. A transient codeload outage during action-tarball fetch can hang the runner for the full default, burning estate budget proportional to (number_of_concurrent_stuck_jobs * 6h).
discovery.first_root_fix: standards#224 (PR 2026-05-27, governance-reusable.yml gained timeout-minutes: 10 on all 8 jobs)
